item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: I need to brag about this
item.description: I've been overweight for more than 18 years and I lost about 40kg the past 3 years. It's not enough to be at a "normal" range (still overweight) but enough to start trying to run safely and it's a real victory for someone who, if you'd asked me 3 years ago that I started to like running, would've laughed you in the face for it. I don't care if this dies in the usersub, I'm feeling good right now. ヾ(⌐■_■)ノ♪ (๑•̀ㅂ•́)و✧ (~‾▿‾)~ Edit: In freedom units: 9km per hour = 5,6 miles per hour, 40kg = 88 pounds
item.dc:creator: Sidaige

item.title: Weird Al Yankovic just dropped a new animated music video, "Polkamania!"
item.description:
Weird Al's newest single is a polka medley parodying hit songs of the last 10 years. The animators included: Ghostbot / Alan Lau, Roque Ballesteros, and Roman Laney – “Flowers” Jack D. Evans – “We Don’t Talk About Bruno” Vivienne Medrano/Spindlehorse – “Vampire” Liam Lynch – “Old Town Road” Jarrett Heather – “Despacito” & “WAP” Bill Plympton – “Shape of You” Ryan Krzak – “Uptown Funk” KukoMitzu – “Thank U, Next” Victor Yerrid & Melanie Mandl – “Shake It Off (pt. 1)”
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y0ZoX4dBvwk
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Would you like to see some adorable otters?
item.description:
That was a rhetorical question. Because of course you want to see some adorable otters.
BABY OTTER SWIM TIME ENRICHMENT
Want to play, but so sleepy....
Toy distraction: 60% of the time, it works every time.
This little baby was just rescued very recently:
These are from the VA Marine Mammal Rescue Society on IG: https://www.instagram.com/vammrs If you have the means, I encourage you to support them in any way you can! ❤️
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Bottom shelf memes that might get you in treble.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@JackalopeElope
We are just ONE DAY AWAY from our ONE YEAR anniversary!! It feels like it was just last week..and also 6 years ago. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Smiley Hiley tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Solar powered car has to keep moving to stay in the sun beam
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: A legendary of action cinema has passed
item.description:
Cheng Pei Pei was an icon of Hong Kong Cinema and had many roles, but her most influential was probably that of Golden Sparrow from the Wuxia Classic "Come Drink with Me"
Like a lot of Western millieninal Wuxia/Kung Fu Enthusiasts, my introduction to her was as the character Jade Fox from Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon
item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

mood

This has basically been me all day

item.title: IT'S NOT THE CANCER!!!!
item.description: I'll be on iron, B-12, and folic acid supplements for the rest of my life, but at least it is not the Cancer coming back. Raise a toast for me and go get a colonoscopy people!

item.title: Working on walking with my cane. Really happy with my progress.
item.description: I have been working on walking with my cane for about 6 months. I'd like to get to the point where I stop using my walker around the house. My main goal is still to walk without any assistance. Really proud of my progress so far.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Funny Friday is back! A dump to make you laugh (unmute)
item.description:
That's the evilest thing I can imagine. If you do this to your programmer friends, I'm simultaneously repulsed and oddly impressed by you. Hey all, had to take a little time off from making Funny Friday posts due to some personal life stuff. But it feels good to be back and let's see if I can make this a good one. As always, more adult humor can be found in a link to a private album that'll be in the comments. Let's have some fun!
We salute a fallen brother who gave his body to science.
A true horror story.
The Prince of all two and a half Saiyans can be a bit of a cry baby.
No notes.
Tormund Giantsbane works in accounting now. Still looking for someone in place of Brienne though.
Someone who is alive right now will write those lyrics someday...
Pro tip: always check what's in a person's hands before letting them close or getting close to them.
Very adult words. And all of them make me sad.
Daphne is the best supernatural investigator there is.
Cue the sad music as the realization dawns.
I'll believe it when they have straps of backup mags and pistols.
Even I feel a little bad for Clippy being reduced to this.
That cat should be named Loki.
Look, if burned out former gifted kids want to be attacked, we'd just go see our parents!
For when the little DIY job turns from Do It Yourself to Doom It Yourself.
Perspective is everything.
Little mix up in the HR department.
Stuck pr0n is getting weirder by the day.
I mean, giving up and intentional apathy is not a *good* coping skill, but it kinda counts.
"Did you know that Viggo broke his finger in this scene?"
Wendy Peffercorn is wise to your tricks. Don't try it.
Picturing Coppola jumping and raging on the shore while Brando munches on a cheeseburger with a smile is a hell of a mental image.
Farts would have worked too.
Sounds about white. (I say as an Irish-American)
But is Garak reliable enough that you can sit back and let him solve all your problems?
This feeling (Robin making us laugh) has got to stay...
"How do you come up with these dumb jokes?" "With my mind, Bert."
This is satire, but sometimes satire hits close to home.
... pspspspspsps *Holds out a piece of sushi*
Finally, almost enough sauce.
I wonder what happens if the guy's name is Benedict...
Might have finally been enough coffee for my ex.
I've seen a couple of billboards that might as well be doing this.
Jack is the fucking best.
And I think we'll close out with something cute and fun. Hopefully you had some laughs and a genuine smile of joy heading into your weekend. See you next time.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Weight loss journey
item.description: I've still got a lot to lose... I had an old Weight Watchers scale and after about a year of it reading E I decided to get serious about losing weight and bought a new scale that I knew couldn't possibly error out because its limit was way higher than what I suspected my weight was close to. My weight ended up being about 30 pounds over the limit of the WW scale. I'm now 10 under that limit. I still have another 50 pounds to go before my old wardrobe will fit, and I'll be back to my old "thicc but not obese" self. I haven't actually been working out or anything, that never works for me. Instead I've been monitoring my carb intake and mostly doing a high protein, high fat diet, reducing my sugar intake. My diet mainly consists of two meals a day. A sausage egg and cheese sandwich on a low carb hamburger bun, and dinner is either a cheeseburger with lettuce and caramelized onion or a "sloppy chop cheese" which is taking the beef and crumble cooking it with chopped onions and some cheese to make it closely resemble a Philly chopped cheese, and on one of those low carb hamburger buns. Actual physical activity has not really increased an appreciable amount. I've generally found that working out plateaus the weight loss after about 20 pounds or so, and then I have to keep exercising the same amount or I gain it back again. Rather than put myself through that hell, I'm just doing what actually works for me: adjusting my diet and getting used to smaller portions. I'm not keeping track of how many times I cheat on the diet. Sometimes I eat more than usual, mostly socially because restaurants have huge portions, and I've gotten ice cream a few times this month because of the heat, but only after being out in the heat for a long freaking time. TL;DR Low stress, high effectiveness diet that I've created specifically for me.
item.dc:creator: BerryBnuuy
